implementation_log: Implemented T09-only technical strategy scaffolding by adding reusable technical feature utilities (SMA and crossover direction), a reference MA crossover strategy adapter conforming to strategy-layer contracts, deterministic contract tests for utility and strategy behavior, and scaffold import list updates for new technical modules. Scope was kept strictly within technical strategy support and excluded chip-flow, selection pipeline, and backtest expansion.
test_execution_summary: Executed targeted validation commands: `pytest tests/test_tw_quant_technical_features_contracts.py -q` (6 passed), `pytest tests/test_tw_quant_technical_strategy_contracts.py -q` (initially 1 failed, then fixed fixture trajectories and reran: 3 passed), `pytest tests/test_tw_quant_scaffold_imports.py -q` (1 passed), and optional sanity `pytest tests/test_tw_quant_interfaces_contracts.py -q` (2 passed).
summary: T09 technical strategy support module is implemented with deterministic contracts and tests, and import scaffolding is updated for the new technical strategy package.
next_action: Route to Manager/QA for T09 scope validation against the approved planner specification.
